mapper.select: select m.message_id, m.item_id, m.sender_id, u.username as sender_name, m.content, m.is_read, m.create_time from message m left join user u on m.sender_id = u.user_id where m.item_id = #{itemId} and m.source_type = #{sourceType} and ((m.sender_id = #{userId} and m.receiver_id = #{otherId}) or (m.sender_id = #{otherId} and m.receiver_id = #{userId})) order by m.create_time asc

select t.item_id, t.source_type, coalesce(i.title, lf.title) as item_title, coalesce(i.image_url, lf.image_url) as item_image, t.other_user_id, u.username as other_user_name, t.last_content, t.last_time, t.unread_count from ( select m.item_id, m.source_type, case when m.sender_id = #{userId} then m.receiver_id else m.sender_id end as other_user_id, substring_index( group_concat(m.content order by m.create_time desc separator '|||'), '|||', 1 ) as last_content, max(m.create_time) as last_time, sum(case when m.receiver_id = #{userId} and m.is_read = 0 then 1 else 0 end ) as unread_count from message m where m.sender_id = #{userId} or m.receiver_id = #{userId} group by m.item_id, m.source_type, other_user_id ) t left join item i on i.item_id = t.item_id and t.source_type = 'item' left join lost_found lf on lf.lost_found_id = t.item_id and t.source_type = 'lostfound' left join user u on u.user_id = t.other_user_id order by t.last_time desc
